text.title: AI Orphan-Link Detection Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for ai-orphan-link-detection.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the PR change user-facing or onboarding-critical markdown?

example.trace: doc.md links `[[non-existent-slug]]` → not in slug index → orphan category=methodology-slug-unknown → verdict=fail.
